title: For Loops
description: Iterating with for and for-in loops.

slides.title: For Loops 🔁

quizData.explanation: The loop runs for i = 0, 1, 2 (three iterations), printing each.

slides.title: See it in Action
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Prefer for-in when you don't need the index

For-in is more readable and less error-prone when you just need to process each element.
